bird.name: Mishana tyrannulet
bird.summary: The Mishana tyrannulet (Zimmerius villarejoi) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is endemic to Peru.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Mishana tyrannulet
relations.evidence: The San Martín population also inhabits stunted forest, including secondary forest, on other nutrient-poor soil types

relations.subject: Mishana tyrannulet
relations.evidence: "The limited extent of appropriate 'varillal' habitat, and the continuing extraction of trees for building materials and posts, means that much of the population is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
